compiled_state.title: [test-ticket-transition-flock]: pre-existing test failure on main branch
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description: tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition-flock.sh is failing on the main branch (pre-existing, not introduced by recent changes). Confirmed pre-existing via git stash test. Needs investigation to determine root cause and fix.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Test test_flock_llm_format_referenced fails deterministically because ticket-transition.sh lacks llm_format/to_llm reference. S2 story e768-2bae was closed without completing the ticket-transition.sh part of the migration.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — test was written to guard the S2 consolidation (e768-2bae) which was not fully implemented for ticket-transition.sh. The test failure is legitimate.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Anti-pattern scan: no candidates found (zero confirmed occurrences of subprocess-reducer-call pattern outside the fixed file). ticket-list.sh and ticket-show.sh were already migrated by the S2 commit.
comments.author: Test
